{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/lfortran/lfortran/issues/5405","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/lfortran/lfortran","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/lfortran/lfortran/issues/5405/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/lfortran/lfortran/issues/5405/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/lfortran/lfortran/issues/5405/events","html_url":"https://github.com/lfortran/lfortran/issues/5405","id":2665141713,"node_id":"I_kwDOCpMuHc6e2tXR","number":5405,"title":"real data type cause segfault or incorrect results on loongarch64 machine","user":{"login":"ouankou","id":1269492,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjEyNjk0OTI=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1269492?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/ouankou","html_url":"https://github.com/ouankou","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ouankou/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ouankou/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ouankou/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ouankou/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ouankou/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ouankou/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ouankou/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ouankou/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ouankou/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-11-17T01:34:54Z","updated_at":"2024-11-17T01:34:54Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"I'm building lfortran 0.42  with LLVM 18 on a loongarch64 machine (CPU model: 3A6000).
cmake config is: ``cmake -DWITH_LLVM=yes -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=`pwd`/inst .``
The build is successful. Then I tried the two examples from lfortran doc website: https://docs.lfortran.org/en/usage/.
Hello-world is good, but the varray one needs a little help.
The `real` element has some weird values, as follows:
```bash
(ssh)ouankou@dehya [ bin ] $ ./lfortran varray.f90 usev.f90
 sum is     0.00000000e+00
```
If adding `print *, A(i)` in the loop:
```bash
(ssh)ouankou@dehya [ bin ] $ ./lfortran varray.f90 usev.f90
3.23790862e-319
0.00000000e+00
0.00000000e+00
0.00000000e+00
0.00000000e+00
0.00000000e+00
0.00000000e+00
0.00000000e+00
 sum is     4.14452254e-317
```

On the same machine, GCC 13 and LLVM 18 worked fine.
```bash
(ssh)ouankou@dehya [ bin ] $ gfortran varray.f90 usev.f90 -o gcc.out && ./gcc.out
  sum is    72.0000000
(ssh)ouankou@dehya [ bin ] $ flang-new varray.f90 usev.f90 -o llvm.out && ./llvm.out
  sum is  72.
```

Additionally, I played with the iterative mode a little, and there's also some issue with real data type.
Assigning a value to a `real` type variable will cause segfault and terminate lfortran immediately.
```bash
(ssh)ouankou@dehya [ bin ] $ ./lfortran
Interactive Fortran. Experimental prototype, not ready for end users.
LFortran version: 0.42.0
  * Use Ctrl-D to exit
  * Use Enter to submit
  * Use Alt-Enter or Ctrl-N to make a new line
    - Editing (Keys: Left, Right, Home, End, Backspace, Delete)
    - History (Keys: Up, Down)
>>> real :: a                                                                                                                                                                                                                         1,10  ]
>>> a = 100                                                                                                                                                                                                                           1,8   ]
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
(ssh)ouankou@dehya [ bin ] !
```

Please let me know if any further information is needed. Thanks for your great work!","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/lfortran/lfortran/issues/5405/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/lfortran/lfortran/issues/5405/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null}}
